summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Talent & People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve candidate and employee experience—through organized, human-centered approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {coord|logistics} for 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, juggling multiple calendars and moving pieces with high accuracy
Establish {prog|scalable processes} and documentation for 70+ {cross|cross-functional staff}, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Identify {prog|process improvements} and streamline repetitive work via {data|feedback analysis}, helping the team scale efficiently
Facilitate training webinars and events for 600+ participants, boosting engagement and achieving a 78% {ex|program enrollment rate}
Supported full-cycle {ex|recruiting logistics}—drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and coordinating with hiring teams across functions
Engaged {ex|candidates} via personalized, warm communication and service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Maintained {tools|recruiting data} and pipelines, keeping candidate records organized and up to date across {cross|hiring teams}
Streamlined onboarding {prog|processes} across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Coordinated a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders} and migrating employee records
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify {ex|employee voice} and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects in survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Supported internal training and consultations on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
